nodes.label: मुफ्त ही मुफ्त (Free Free)
nodes.description: Chapter 14 - A humorous story about what happens when people hear the word 'free'

nodes.label: कहानी (Story)
nodes.description: A funny story about people getting excited over free things and what happens next

nodes.label: पात्र (Characters)
nodes.description: The ordinary people in the story who lose control when they hear things are free

nodes.label: घटनाएँ (Events)
nodes.description: The funny chain of events - hearing 'free', rushing, grabbing, fighting, and the final twist

nodes.label: हास्य (Humour)
nodes.description: The comedy in the story - people's crazy behaviour and funny dialogues

nodes.label: मज़ेदार दृश्य (Funny Scenes)
nodes.description: People running madly, stuffing pockets, grabbing from each other, and the surprise ending

nodes.label: मज़ेदार संवाद (Funny Dialogues)
nodes.description: Humorous conversations between characters that make readers laugh

nodes.label: मुख्य विषय (Main Themes)
nodes.description: The important lessons and values taught by this humorous story

nodes.label: लालच (Greed)
nodes.description: The danger of wanting more than you need - 'लालच बुरी बला' (greed is evil)

nodes.label: मूल्य (Value)
nodes.description: Everything has a value - nothing in the world is truly free

nodes.label: संयम (Self-Control)
nodes.description: The importance of thinking before acting and not losing control over temptation

nodes.label: सीख (Moral)
nodes.description: Do not be greedy, think before you grab, and remember that nothing is truly free

nodes.label: भाषा कार्य (Language Skills)
nodes.description: Hindi vocabulary, idioms, and comprehension skills from this chapter

nodes.label: नए शब्द (New Words)
nodes.description: मुफ्त, लालच, संतोष, मूल्य, बटोरना, उत्साह, संयम, हास्य, मुहावरा, सीख

nodes.label: मुहावरे (Idioms)
nodes.description: लालच बुरी बला, मुफ्त का चंदन घिस मेरे नंदन - Hindi idioms related to this chapter
